title: PROC_ARST misinterprets a clock as an async reset

features.name: vhdl_style_clock_level_check_in_edge_triggered_block
features.description: Code should include an always @(posedge clock) block that contains a conditional level check on the same clock signal (if (clock == 1'b1) or if (clock == 1'b0))
features.snippet:
always @(posedge clk)
begin
   if (clk == 1'b1)
   begin
      q <= d;
   end
end
